description_long: This object is a modern tactical rifle, featuring a matte black finish and a modular design. It has a collapsible stock at the rear, a pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard. The upper receiver includes a carry handle with integrated iron sights, and the handguard is ribbed for improved grip. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a cylindrical suppressor. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, ribbed handguard, detachable magazine, and a suppressor on the barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, collapsible stock, pistol grip, magazine, and carry handle with iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the collapsible stock and the alignment of the barrel and suppressor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the handguard and magazine.
